Spells-Druid — Female Human Druid: 10
Strength: 12 (+1) Dexterity: 13 (+1) Constitution: 17 (+3) Intelligence: 10 (+0) Wisdom: 16 (+3) Charisma: 19 (+4)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Chaotic Evil
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 2; Intelligence: 2; Wisdom: 1 Experience: 72501/85000 Level: 10 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 180/360
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Ability Boosts: 5 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +4
Feat Count: General: 2; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Druid (Druid Subclass); Druid (Elemental Fury); Druid (Primal Order)
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Alert; Archery Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Druid Features: Armor Training (Light; Shield); Circle Of The Land Spells; Circle Of The Land; Druid Subclass; Druidic; Elemental Fury; Land's Aid; Magician; Natural Recovery; Nature's Ward; Primal Order; Primal Strike; Save Proficiency (Intelligence; Wisdom); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Animal Handling, Arcana, Insight, Medicine, Nature, Perception, Religion, Survival); Spellcasting; Tool Proficiency (Herbalism Kit); Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons); Wild Companion; Wild Resurgence; Wild Shape Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Druid Subclass: 1 selection
Elemental Fury: 1 selection
Primal Order: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skill Proficiency: Animal Handling; Insight; Investigation; Religion; Survival
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +1 Insight: (wis) +7 Performance: (cha) +4
Animal Handling: (wis) +7 Intimidation: (cha) +4 Persuasion: (cha) +4
Arcana: (int) +3 Investigation: (int) +4 Religion: (int) +4
Athletics: (str) +1 Medicine: (wis) +3 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +1
Deception: (cha) +4 Nature: (int) +3 Stealth: (dex) +1
History: (int) +0 Perception: (wis) +3 Survival: (wis) +7
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex); Herbalism Kit: (int)
Skill Notes:
Magician: +3 Arcana/+3 Nature
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Druidic: Speaks a secret language known only by druids
Combat
Hit Points: 62 Initiative: +5 Armor Class: 12
Armor Training: Light; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Simple Weapons
Armor: Padded Shield: None Weapons: Greatclub (+5 1d8+1 B; Push); Quarterstaff (+5 1d6+1 B [2h d8]; Topple); Sling (+5 1d4+1 B R30/120; Slow); Unarmed (+5 1+1 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +4 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +30
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +1
Strength Attack Adjustment: +1
Strength Damage Adjustment: +1
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Archery: +2 ranged attacks
Primal Strike: Weapon or natural attacks inflict +1d8 HP of a choice of cold, fire, lightning, or thunder once per turn
Save Proficiency: Intelligence; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +4; Constitution: +3; Dexterity: +1; Intelligence: +4; Strength: +1; Wisdom: +7
Save Notes: Nature's Ward: Has immunity to poisoned and resistance to fire, cold, lightning, or poison depending on whether Circle Spells are currently taken from Arid, Polar, Temperate, or Tropical Land
Magic
Spell Slots: D0: 5; D1: 4; D2: 3; D3: 3; D4: 3; D5: 2 Attack: C: +7; D: +7 Spell DC: C: 15; D: 15
Spells:
Acid Splash (Tropical Land0 [Tropical Land] Evoc): R60' Inflicts 2d6 HP acid (save Dexterity negates) in a 5' radius
Aid (D2 Abju): R30' 3 targets gain +5 current and maximum hit points for 8 hr [+Level gives +5 hit points]
Animal Friendship (D1 Ench): R30' Charms a target beast (save Wisdom negates) for 24 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Animal Messenger (D2 Ench): R30' Tiny beast target moves to deliver a 25-word message to a described recipient (save Charisma negates; CR greater than 0 automatically succeeds) for 24 hr [+Level extends the duration +48 hr] [R]
Animal Shapes (D8 Tran): R30' Willing targets become CR 4, Large or smaller beasts, gaining temporary hit points appropriate to the beasts, for 24 hr or until ended by each target
Antilife Shell (D5 Abju): 10' radius prevents the passage of living creatures for concentration up to 1 hr
Antipathy/Sympathy (D8 Ench): R60' Target creature or object charms or frightens a specified creature type within 120' (save Wisdom negates; additional saves when no longer within 120' end and give immunity for 1 min) for 10 days
Augury (D2 Divi): Reveals the weal or woe outcome of a proposed act up to 30 min in the future; additional uses before a long rest impose a cumulative 25% chance of receiving a random response [R]
Awaken (D5 Tran): Touched beast or plant gains Intelligence 10, speech, and movement and becomes charmed for 30 days or until harmed
Barkskin (D2 Tran): Willing touched gains Armor Class 17 for 1 hr
Befuddlement (D8 Ench): R150' Target suffers 10d6 HP psychic and loss of spells and Magic actions (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves every 30 days end)
Blight (Arid Land4 [Arid Land] Necr): R30' Inflicts 8d8 HP necrotic (save Constitution half; plant target automatically fails) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Blight (D4 Necr): R30' Inflicts 8d8 HP necrotic (save Constitution half; plant target automatically fails) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Blur (Arid Land2 [Arid Land] Illu): Foes suffer disadvantage when using sight to attack self for concentration up to 1 min
Burning Hands (Arid Land1 [Arid Land] Evoc): 15' cone inflicts 3d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Call Lightning (D3 Conj): R120' 5' radius inflicts 3d10 HP lightning (save Dexterity half; +1d10 HP if using a natural storm) once per rd for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Charm Monster (D4 Ench): R30' Target becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Charm Person (D1 Ench): R30' Target humanoid becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Commune With Nature (D5 Divi): Reveals 3 facts about nature within 3 miles, or within 300' when underground [R]
Cone Of Cold (D5 Evoc): 60' cone inflicts 8d8 HP cold (save Constitution half) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Cone Of Cold (Polar Land5 [Polar Land] Evoc): 60' cone inflicts 8d8 HP cold (save Constitution half) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Confusion (D4 Ench): R90' Creatures in a 10' radius lose reactions and bonus actions and randomly: 10% wander; 50% do nothing; 20% attack an adjacent creature; 20% act normally (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level increases the radius by 5']
Conjure Animals (D3 Conj): R60' 10' radius inflicts 3d10 HP slashing (save Dexterity negates), and 5' radius gives self advantage on Strength saves, for concentration up to 10 min; can be moved 30' each turn [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Conjure Elemental (D5 Conj): R60' 5' radius restrains a target and inflicts 8d8 HP of a choice of lightning, thunder, fire, or cold (save Dexterity negates), inflicting an additional 4d8 HP each rd until a successful Dexterity save, for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Conjure Fey (D6 Conj): R60' Melee spell attacks by a summoned spirit inflict 3d12+3 HP psychic and frightened until the start of the next turn for concentration up to 10 min; can be moved 30' each turn as a bonus action [+Level inflicts +1d12 HP]
Conjure Minor Elementals (D4 Conj): Self attacks within 15' inflict +2d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, or lightning for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Conjure Woodland Beings (D4 Conj): 10' emanation inflicts 5d8 HP force (save Wisdom half) and allows self to use a bonus action to Disengage for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Contagion (D5 Necr): Touch inflicts 11d8 HP necrotic, poisoned, and disadvantage on chosen ability saves (save Constitution negates; subsequent saves each turn either end after three successes or extend to 7 days after 3 failures; other effects that would end poisoned require a successful Constitution save to succeed)
Continual Flame (D2 Evoc): Touched emits a heatless torch flame
Control Water (D4 Tran): R300' Water in a 100' cube rises 20', parts, redirects, or forms a whirlpool for concentration up to 10 min
Control Weather (D8 Tran): Adjusts the temperature, wind, and precipitation in a 5 mile radius for concentration up to 8 hr
Create Or Destroy Water (D1 Tran): R30' Creates or destroys 10 gallons of water or fog in a 30' cube [+Level affects +10 gallons or a +5' cube]
Cure Wounds (D1 Abju): Touched regains 2d8+3 hit points [+Level restores +2d8 hit points]
Darkvision (D2 Tran): Willing touched sees 150' in darkness for 8 hr
Daylight (D3 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Detect Magic (D1 Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Poison And Disease (D1 Divi): R30' Reveals poison, poisonous creatures, and magical contagions for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Dispel Magic (D3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Divination (D4 Divi): Answers a question about an event up to 7 days in the future; additional uses before a long rest add a 25% chance of failure [R]
Dominate Beast (D4 Ench): R60' Target beast obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 5, 6, or 7]
Druidcraft (D0 Tran): R30' Predicts 24 hr weather, causes a plant to bloom, creates a minor sensory effect, or lights or snuffs a small fire
Earthquake (D8 Tran): R500' 100' radius inflicts difficult terrain, opens fissures, damages structures, knocks prone, and breaks concentration (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Elementalism (D0 Tran): R30' Moves air or dust in a 5' cube, creates smoke or mist in a 5' cube for 1 min, or sculpts a 1' cube of dirt, sand, fire, smoke, mist, or water for 1 hr
Enhance Ability (D2 Tran): Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Enlarge/Reduce (D2 Tran): R30' Target increases a size category, gaining advantage on Strength checks and +1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, or decreases a size category, suffering disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min; can instead target an unattended object
Entangle (D1 Conj): R90' 20' sq inflicts difficult terrain and restrains creatures (save Strength negates; additional Athletics saves each rd ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Faerie Fire (D1 Evoc): R60' Objects and creatures in a 20' cube glow (save Dexterity negates), giving their foes advantage on attacks, for concentration up to 1 min
Feeblemind (D8 Ench): R150' Target suffers 4d6 HP psychic and reduction of Charisma and Intelligence to 1 (save Intelligence HP only; additional saves every 30 days end)
Find Familiar (D1 [Wild Companion] Conj): R10' Self gains the service of a summoned spirit in animal form that allows telepathic communication, remote sensing, and use of its reaction to deliver remote touch attacks when within 100' [R]
Find The Path (D6 Divi): Reveals the shortest path to a specified familiar destination for concentration up to 1 day
Find Traps (D2 Divi): R120' Reveals the presence of traps
Fire Bolt (Arid Land0 [Arid Land] Evoc): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 2d10 HP fire or ignites an unattended flammable target
Fire Shield (D4 Evoc): Self emits a 10' bright light and gains resistance to a choice of heat or cold, and successful adjacent attackers suffer 2d8 HP fire or cold, for 10 min
Fire Storm (D7 Evoc): R150' 10 contiguous 10' cubes inflict 7d10 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Fireball (Arid Land3 [Arid Land] Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 8d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Flame Blade (D2 Evoc): Self wields a flaming blade that inflicts 3d6+3 HP fire and emits a 10' bright light for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Flaming Sphere (D2 Conj): R60' 5' sphere emits a 20' bright light, inflicts 2d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) on creatures within 5', and ignites unattended flammable objects for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to move it 30', rolling over 5' barriers and jumping 10' gaps [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Flesh To Stone (D6 Tran): R60' Target becomes restrained (save Constitution negates), then petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates) for concentration; the effects become permanent after 1 min of concentration
Fog Cloud (D1 Conj): R120' 20' radius obscures vision for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level increases the radius by 20']
Fog Cloud (Polar Land1 [Polar Land] Conj): R120' 20' radius obscures vision for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level increases the radius by 20']
Foresight (D9 Divi): Touched gains advantage on attack, ability, and saves, and foes suffer disadvantage on attacks, for 8 hr
Freedom Of Movement (D4 Abju): Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and a 30' swim Speed and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Freedom Of Movement (Temperate Land4 [Temperate Land] Abju): Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and a 30' swim Speed and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Geas (D5 Ench): R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic each day (save Wisdom negates) for 30 days [+Level extends the duration to 365 days or permanently at level 7 or 9]
Giant Insect (D4 Conj): R60' Summons a choice of an obedient giant centipede, spider, or wasp for concentration up to 10 min; it has Armor Class 15, 30 hit points, a 40' Speed, understanding of self languages, and 2 +3 attacks per rd that inflict 1d6+7 HP piercing and 1d4 HP poison; centipedes also have a R10' attack that inflicts poisoned for 1 rd, spiders a range 60' attack that inflicts 1d10+7 bludgeoning and loss of movement for 1 rd, and wasps a 40' fly Speed [+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, number of attacks by 1 per 2 levels, piercing damage by 1, and spider's bludgeoning damage by 1]
Goodberry (D1 Conj): Creates 10 berries that last for 24 hr; each restores 1 hit point and provides nourishment for 1 day
Greater Restoration (D5 Abju): Touched recovers from an effect causing an exhaustion level, a charmed or petrified condition, a curse, an ability reduction, or a reduction of hit point maximum
Guidance (D0 Divi): Touched gains +1d4 on a choice of skill for concentration up to 1 min
Gust Of Wind (D2 Evoc): 60'x10' wind pushes 15' (save Strength negates), inflicts half movement, disperses gas and vapor, and extinguishes flames (50% chance for protected flames) for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to redirect the wind
Hallucinatory Terrain (D4 Illu): R300' Creates a 150' cube terrain illusion (Investigation detects) for 24 hr
Heal (D6 Abju): R60' Target regains 70 hit points and recovers from blinded, deafened, and poisoned [+Level restores +10 hit points]
Healing Word (D1 Abju): R60' Target regains 2d4+3 hit points [+Level restores +2d4 hit points]
Heat Metal (D2 Tran): R60' Touching the target metal inflicts 2d8 HP fire, plus attack and ability disadvantage if the the target is worn or held (save Constitution negates disadvantage), for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to repeat the initial damage [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Heroes' Feast (D6 Conj): 12 diners who consume a 1-hr meal gain resistance to poison, immunity to becoming poisoned and frightened, and +2d10 hit points and maximum hit points for 24 hr
Hold Person (D2 Ench): R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Hold Person (Polar Land2 [Polar Land] Ench): R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Ice Knife (D1 Conj): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 1d10 HP piercing on a hit and 2d6 HP cold in a 5' radius (save Dexterity negates cold) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP cold]
Ice Storm (D4 Evoc): R300' 20' radius inflicts 2d10 HP bludgeoning and 4d6 HP cold (save Dexterity half) and becomes difficult terrain until the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP bludgeoning]
Ice Storm (Polar Land4 [Polar Land] Evoc): R300' 20' radius inflicts 2d10 HP bludgeoning and 4d6 HP cold (save Dexterity half) and becomes difficult terrain until the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP bludgeoning]
Incendiary Cloud (D8 Conj): R150' 20' radius inflicts 10d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half), obscures, and moves away 10' per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Insect Plague (D5 Conj): R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Insect Plague (Tropical Land5 [Tropical Land] Conj): R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Jump (D1 Tran): Touched can jump 30' after a 10' move for 1 min
Lesser Restoration (D2 Abju): Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Lightning Bolt (Temperate Land3 [Temperate Land] Evoc): 100'x5' line inflicts 8d6 HP lightning (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Locate Animals Or Plants (D2 Divi): Reveals the location within 5 miles of a specified kind of beast or plant [R]
Locate Creature (D4 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; lead blocks the spell
Locate Object (D2 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified object or type within 1000' for concentration up to 10 min; lead blocks the spell
Longstrider (D1 Tran): Touched gains +10' Speed for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Mass Cure Wounds (D5 Abju): R60' 6 targets in a 30' radius regain 5d8+3 HP [+Level restores +1d8 HP]
Meld Into Stone (D3 Tran): Self steps into rock, losing sight and suffering disadvantage on hearing Perception but allowing casting spells on self, for up to 8 hr; significant partial destruction of the stone inflicts 6d6 HP force, expulsion, and prone to self, and complete destruction increases the damage to 50 HP [R]
Mending (D0 Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Message (D0 Tran): R120' Self and target can hold a whispered conversation for 1 rd; can be cast through objects, but 1' of wood, stone, or metal or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Mirage Arcane (D7 Illu): Creates 1 mile sq of illusionary terrain for 10 days
Misty Step (Temperate Land2 [Temperate Land] Conj): Teleports self 30'
Moonbeam (D2 Evoc): R120' 5' radius inflicts 2d10 HP radiant (save Constitution half; shapechangers revert form on failure) and can move 60' per rd for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Move Earth (D6 Tran): R120' Reshapes a 40' cube of earth each 10 minutes for concentration up to 2 hr
Pass Without Trace (D2 Abju): Targets in a 30' radius gain +10 Stealth and leave no tracks for concentration up to 1 hr
Planar Binding (D5 Abju): R60' Binds a celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend to service (save Charisma negates) for 24 hr [+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, 180, or 366 days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9]
Plane Shift (D7 Conj): Self and 8 willing others travel to another plane
Plant Growth (D3 Tran): R150' Causes plants in a 100' radius to overgrow, slowing movement to 1/4 Speed, or enriches a half-mile radius for 365 days
Poison Spray (D0 Necr): R30' Ranged spell inflicts 2d12 HP poison
Polymorph (D4 Tran): R60' Transforms the target creature into a beast, with temporary hit points appropriate to the beast, (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 temporary hit points
Polymorph (Tropical Land4 [Tropical Land] Tran): R60' Transforms the target creature into a beast, with temporary hit points appropriate to the beast, (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 temporary hit points
Produce Flame (D0 Conj): Emits bright light in a 10' radius for 10 min; allows a R60' ranged spell attack each rd that inflicts 2d8 HP fire
Protection From Energy (D3 Abju): Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Evil And Good (D1 Abju): Willing touched gains immunity to charmed, frightened, and possession from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and advantage on saves vs. existing conditions for concentration up to 10 min; those creatures also suffer disadvantage on attacks on the target
Protection From Poison (D2 Abju): Touched recovers from the poisoned condition and gains advantage on saves vs. being poisoned and resistance to poison for 1 hr
Purify Food And Drink (D1 Tran): R10' Removes poison and disease from nonmagical food and drink in a 5' radius [R]
Ray Of Frost (Polar Land0 [Polar Land] Evoc): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP cold and -10' Speed until the start of the next turn
Ray Of Sickness (Tropical Land1 [Tropical Land] Necr): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP poison and poisoned until the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Regenerate (D7 Tran): Touched regains 4d8+15 hit points, plus 1 hit point per rd for 1 hr, and regrows severed parts after 2 min
Reincarnate (D5 Necr): Resurrects the willing soul of a touched 10-day-old corpse in a new body
Resistance (D0 Abju): Touched reduces by 1d4 HP any damage taken from a choice of acid, bludgeoning, cold, fire, lightning, necrotic, piercing, poison, radiant, slashing, or thunder for concentration up to 1 min
Reverse Gravity (D7 Tran): R100' Items in a 100'x100' cylinder fall upward for concentration up to 1 min
Revivify (D3 Necr): Restores life and 1 hit point to a touched 1-minute-old corpse
Scrying (D5 Divi): Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
Shapechange (D9 Tran): Allows self to polymorph repeatedly into familiar living creatures of equal or lesser CR, initially gaining temporary hit points of the first creature, for concentration up to 1 hr
Shillelagh (D0 Tran): Held club gains +7 attacks that inflict 1d10+3 HP of a choice of force or weapon damage for 1 min
Shocking Grasp (Temperate Land0 [Temperate Land] Evoc): Touch inflicts 2d8 HP lightning and loss of opportunity attacks until its next turn
Sleep (Temperate Land1 [Temperate Land] Ench): R60' Each target in a 5' radius becomes incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) until the end of its next turn, then unconscious (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min (damage or shaking awakens)
Sleet Storm (D3 Conj): R150' 20' radius obscures, douses exposed flames, and inflicts difficult terrain and prone (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Sleet Storm (Polar Land3 [Polar Land] Conj): R150' 20' radius obscures, douses exposed flames, and inflicts difficult terrain and prone (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Spare The Dying (D0 Necr): R30' Target dying creature becomes stable
Speak With Animals (D1 Divi): Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Speak With Animals (R1 [Druidic] Divi): Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Speak With Plants (D3 Tran): Self can talk with and command plants in a 30' radius for 10 min
Spike Growth (D2 Tran): R150' 20' radius becomes difficult terrain and inflicts 2d4 HP piercing per 5' movement for concentration up to 10 min
Starry Wisp (D0 Evoc): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP radiant and a dim glow until the end of the next turn
Stinking Cloud (Tropical Land3 [Tropical Land] Conj): R90' 20' radius inflicts poisoned and loss of actions for 1 rd (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Stone Shape (D4 Tran): Reshapes touched 5' cube of stone
Stoneskin (D4 Tran): Touched gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing for concentration up to 1 hr
Storm Of Vengeance (D9 Conj): 300' radius within 1 mile inflicts 2d6 HP thunder and deafness (save Constitution negates), then 4d6 HP acid, then 10d6 HP lightning (6 targets; save Dexterity half), then 2d6 HP bludgeoning, then 1d6 HP cold per rd, difficult terrain, and no ranged attacks for concentration up to 1 min
Sunbeam (D6 Evoc): 5'x60' line inflicts 6d8 HP radiant and blindness until the start of the next turn (save Constitution half HP only) each rd for concentration up to 1 min
Sunburst (D8 Evoc): R150' 60' radius inflicts 12d6 HP radiant and blindness for 1 min (save Constitution half HP only; an additional save each turn ends blindness)
Symbol (D7 Abju): Inscribes a touched object with a permanent glyph that, when triggered, inflicts a choice of harmful magic effect: 10d10 HP necrotic (save Constitution half); arguing for 1 min that inflicts disadvantage on attacks and ability checks (save Wisdom negates); frightened and fleeing for 1 min (save Wisdom negates); incapacitated by pain for 1 min (save Constitution negates); asleep for 10 min or until shaken or harmed (save Wisdom negates); stunned for 1 min (save Wisdom negates)
Thunderwave (D1 Evoc): 15' cube inflicts 2d8 HP thunder and pushes 10' (save Constitution half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Transport Via Plants (D6 Conj): R10' Allows creatures to use 5' of movement to teleport any distance from the targeted Large plant to a specified familiar Large plant for 1 min
Tree Stride (D5 Conj): Allows self to use 10' of movement to teleport 500' between like trees once per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Tree Stride (Temperate Land5 [Temperate Land] Conj): Allows self to use 10' of movement to teleport 500' between like trees once per rd for concentration up to 1 min
True Resurrection (D9 Necr): Restores life and full hit points to and removes all diseases, poisons, wounds, and curses from a willing touched corpse or named creature dead up to 200 years
Tsunami (D8 Conj): R1 mile 300'x300'x50' wall of water inflicts 5d10 HP bludgeoning (save Strength half); it moves away 50' per rd, reducing its height by 50' and its damage by 1d10 HP each rd, for concentration up to 6 rd
Wall Of Fire (D4 Evoc): R120' Creates a 60'x20'x1' wall or a 20'x20'x1' ring that inflicts 5d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) within 10' of a chosen side for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Wall Of Stone (Arid Land5 [Arid Land] Evoc): R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10'x6" or 10'x20'x3" stone panels (save Dexterity avoids entrapment), with Armor Class 15 and 30 hit points each, for concentration up to 10 min; concentrating for 10 min makes the wall permanent
Wall Of Stone (D5 Evoc): R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10'x6" or 10'x20'x3" stone panels (save Dexterity avoids entrapment), with Armor Class 15 and 30 hit points each, for concentration up to 10 min; concentrating for 10 min makes the wall permanent
Wall Of Thorns (D6 Conj): R120' Creates a 60'x10'x5' wall or a 20'x20'x5' ring that inflicts 7d8 HP piercing (save Dexterity half) initially, plus 1/4 Speed and 7d8 HP slashing to creatures passing through (save Dexterity half) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Water Breathing (D3 Tran): R30' 10 willing targets can breathe underwater for 24 hr [R]
Water Walk (D3 Tran): R30' 10 willing targets can traverse liquids for 1 hr [R]
Web (Tropical Land2 [Tropical Land] Conj): R60' 20' cube inflicts difficult terrain and restrains creatures (save Dexterity negates; Athletics frees) for concentration up to 1 hr; burning the web inflicts 2d4 HP fire
Wind Walk (D6 Tran): R30' Self and 10 willing others can become gaseous, gaining a 300' fly Speed and resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing, at will for 8 hr; converting to or from gas inflicts stunned for 1 min
Wind Wall (D3 Evoc): R120' Creates a 50'x15'x1' area that inflicts 4d8 HP bludgeoning (save Strength half) and deflects lightweight creatures, objects, and projectiles for concentration up to 1 min
Magic Notes:
Circle Of The Land Spells: Has the Arid Land, Polar Land, Temperate Land, and Tropical Land features
Magician: Knows +1 Druid cantrip
Circle Of The Land Spells: Can choose spells from 1 type of land to have prepared after a long rest
Druidic: Knows the Speak With Animals spell
Land's Aid: R60' Can expend a Wild Shape use to inflict 3d6 HP necrotic to targets in a 10' radius; an additional target regains an equal number of hit points
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Natural Recovery: Can cast 1 Druid spell without using a spell slot and recover 5 spell slot levels (level 5 maximum) during a short rest once per long rest
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the druid spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
Wild Companion: Can expend a spell slot or a use of Wild Shape to summon a Fey familiar using Find Familiar; the familiar remains present until the next long rest
Wild Resurgence: Can expend a Wild Shape use to gain a level 1 spell slot once per long rest and expend a spell slot to gain a Wild Shape use
Wild Shape: Can transform into a CR 1 creature with 10 temporary hit points for 5 hr 3 times per long rest; a short rest restores 1 use
